name: Weekly Service Uptime Report
description: Generate a weekly uptime report from your monitoring data. Calculates SLA compliance per service and emails a formatted report to engineering leadership.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT service, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 3) AS uptime_pct, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'down' THEN 1 END) AS outages, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'down' THEN duration_seconds ELSE 0 END) / 60, 0) AS total_downtime_minutes FROM uptime_checks WHERE checked_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY service ORDER BY uptime_pct ASC
